{
  dbo_GetUsersByFilter_email_unpaged.sql:
-- <auto-generated>
--   This file was generated by DbProcGen.
--   Any changes to this file will be overwritten on next generation.
-- </auto-generated>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetUsersByFilter_email_unpaged]
    @FilterType nvarchar(32),
    @IsPaged bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Worker procedure for route: EmailUnpaged
    -- Conditions: FilterTypeAxis = 'Email' AND PagingAxis = 'false'
    -- Specialized implementation for this parameter combination

    SELECT
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS [UserId],
        CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(200)) AS [DisplayName]
    WHERE 1 = 0;
END
GO
,
  dbo_GetUsersByFilter_name_paged.sql:
-- <auto-generated>
--   This file was generated by DbProcGen.
--   Any changes to this file will be overwritten on next generation.
-- </auto-generated>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetUsersByFilter_name_paged]
    @FilterType nvarchar(32),
    @IsPaged bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Worker procedure for route: NamePaged
    -- Conditions: FilterTypeAxis = 'Name' AND PagingAxis = 'true'
    -- Specialized implementation for this parameter combination

    SELECT
        CAST(NULL AS int) AS [UserId],
        CAST(NULL AS nvarchar(200)) AS [DisplayName]
    WHERE 1 = 0;
END
GO
,
  dbo_GetUsersByFilter.sql:
-- <auto-generated>
--   This file was generated by DbProcGen.
--   Any changes to this file will be overwritten on next generation.
-- </auto-generated>

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GetUsersByFilter]
    @FilterType nvarchar(32),
    @IsPaged bit
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Wrapper procedure (public SQL API)
    -- Routes to specialized worker procedures based on parameter values

    IF 1 = 0 AND 1 = 0
    BEGIN
        EXEC [dbo].[GetUsersByFilter_name_paged]
            @FilterType = @FilterType,
        @IsPaged = @IsPaged;
        RETURN;
    END

    ELSE IF 1 = 0 AND 1 = 0
    BEGIN
        EXEC [dbo].[GetUsersByFilter_email_unpaged]
            @FilterType = @FilterType,
        @IsPaged = @IsPaged;
        RETURN;
    END

    THROW 50001, 'No matching route for generated wrapper procedure.', 1;
END
GO

      "wrapperFile": "dbo_GetUsersByFilter.sql",
      "workers": [
        {
          "routeName": "EmailUnpaged",
          "workerSuffix": "email_unpaged",
          "workerFile": "dbo_GetUsersByFilter_email_unpaged.sql",

            {
              "axis": "FilterTypeAxis",
              "value": "Email"

              "axis": "PagingAxis",
              "value": "false"
